# Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `markdownlint` locally (or CI is green).
- [ ] Validated any changed JSON with `jq empty`.
- [ ] Ran `bash tests/hooks/test_lint_changed.sh` if hook scripts changed.
- [ ] Content has been human-reviewed — agent-authored prose has been read end-to-end by a human and edited for accuracy.
- [ ] Verified any new Copilot CLI feature references against current vendor docs (not training-data assumptions).

See `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the full contribution guide.
